title: Jurisdiction. In the exercise of its regulatory and quasi-judicial powers, the
content: 33 Department shall exercise its original and exclusive as well as appellate jurisdiction, as 34 provided under R.A. No. 11641 and its IRR, to hear and decide all cases which are 35 administrative in character involving or arising out of: 36 37 1) violation of recruitment rules and regulations including refund of fees collected 38 from seafarers and any violation of the conditions for the issuance of the license 39 to recruit seafarers; and 40 41 2) disciplinary action cases that are administrative in character, excluding money 42 claims. 43 44 45 Conciliation 46 47
